response: The April marketing campaign generated 45K impressions, 2.3K clicks (5.1% CTR), and 187 signups (8.1% conversion) at a cost of $12K, with a customer acquisition cost (CAC) of $64 per signup, though the conversion rate decreased by 0.8pp compared to March. The team recommends A/B testing the landing page call-to-action (CTA) to improve performance.
